title: Meshcore on RAK3312 with RAK14000 (display) and RAK 12500 (GNSS GPS)

messages.author: MakerPat
messages.text: is there a firmware out there to support that HW combination ? It is originally designed for meshtastic but I would like to go meshcore. TIA.Patrick (edited)
